title: Nebulus evil samurai battletower for the cherry grove
description: adds a new evil mob and an new items
body:
This mod adds a new structure,weapons and mob to the cherrygrove.

 

This mod also adds:

    • a new mob to fight

    • you get a new ingot for smiting

    • there is new loot available like the soul

    • a new katana was added it's name is the Shadow Slayer

 

Additional information:

You can find the Evil Samurai Battletower by exploring the overworld and find him in the cherrygrove.

The Shadow Katana Can you repair with the shadow ingot.

 

For modshowcase click 👉🏼here👈🏼

 

The receipt:

crafting receipt
